title.en: Therefore, if he encounters it, he is quickly b...

content.en:
"Got the attention of the Void Beast!"

Ye Tian encountered a number of Void Beast teams, each of which was led by a second-order Void Beast, even if the Void Beast's intelligence was very low, it would not be possible to cooperate, but there must be a powerful Void Beast behind the scenes.

Therefore, if he encounters it, he is quickly besieged.

"This area must be abandoned!~"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he left this area of nothingness and went to other areas of nothingness to continue looking for the Void Beast, so as to hunt.

However, he didn't know much about this area of nothingness, so he quickly broke into the inner circle of a group of void beasts, and even though he had the talent to copy to explore, he was still surrounded

As a result, Ye Tian directly gave up this replica body and did not meet and fight with these Void Beasts.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian used a replica body to explore the way, and finally found the right route and came to another void area.

Here, the Voidmon didn't come out in groups.

Subsequently, Ye Tian hunted the Void Beast in this area.

However, after killing some Void Beasts, Ye Tian attracted the attention of this lord, and Ye Tian immediately left.

After changing several areas, Ye Tian could be regarded as touching the bottom line of the Void Beast.

A fifth-order Void Beast descended here, and this Void Beast was going to personally kill the Eternal Realm that had infiltrated here.

How terrifying the fifth-order void beast that was comparable to the legendary lord level, Ye Tian quickly understood.

When Ye Tian was about to kill a first-order void beast in an instant, the surrounding void area shook, and a figure came from a distant place across the void.

Zizi Zizi!!!

The Void Region was shattered, and an incomparably large Void Beast descended, and it was a fifth-order Void Beast.

"Life in the space-time territory, you are looking for death!"

The fifth-order Void Beast slapped over with one claw.

No matter how Ye Tian resisted, it was useless, and the three replica bodies were directly frozen, and they were immediately destroyed by a single blow.

Another place.

Ye Tian's last copy body here immediately recondensed the three copy bodies, and then dispersed, lest this place also be tracked by the fifth-order void beast.

After a long time, Ye Tian was sure that the fifth-order void beast would not be able to track him, so he breathed a sigh of relief.

"It looks like it's going to be hard to keep hunting the Void Beast!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he has also gained a lot, and now he has raised the degree of fusion of his will and body to the realm of two or five, which is a realm that many Immortal Realm lords can't reach and he has only cultivated for such a short time.

I've gone deep into the realm of the Voidmon!

Ye Tian suddenly thought... He estimated that the beasts were completely angry, and if he returned the same way, he might not be able to withdraw safely.

Besides, even if all of his copied bodies fell, there would be no loss, after all, his strength had improved, and there were not many resources on his body, so the loss would be lost.

Therefore, Ye Tian prepared to go deeper into the depths of the Void Beast's territory, maybe there would be other gains.

In this way, Ye Tian's four replica bodies separated and headed to the depths of the Void Beast's territory.

Along the way, there were constantly duplicate bodies discovered by the Void Beast, and then bombarded by the Fifth Order Void Beast or the Fourth Order Void Beast.

As time passed, Ye Tian found that the resources in his body were exhausted, and there was no way to condense and copy his body.

Condensing the replication body requires energy, and this is a void area, there is no energy supply, and the energy in the body is exhausted, no matter how awesome the replication talent is, there is no way to condense a new replication body.

Unless he finds a treasure place and collects some resources, he can continue to condense new replica bodies.

After another period of time, even if Ye Tian was careful, two of the four replica bodies still fell, and only two replica bodies were still on the territory of the Void Beast.

this day.

Ye Tian was lucky, and he actually found a broken world in the Void Region, which can also be said to be a ruin.

And near this ruin, there are still many Void Beasts.

Ye Tian didn't perceive the existence of a third-order void beast, and the most powerful void beast here was only a second-order void beast.

"How can there be a world of relics in the territory of the Void Beast?"

Ye Tian was curious.

This must not be the lair of the Void Beast, because on this world ruin, he clearly felt the fluctuation of the formation, and the Void Beast did not know the formation, and their low IQ could not create a cultivation civilization at all.

Therefore, the ruins here must not belong to the Void Beast.

"Could it be a relic of the space-time territory?"

Ye Tian secretly guessed.

But this is not very likely, because this place is too far away from the space-time territory, if it is really a relic of the space-time territory, it is impossible to run here, and even the Void Beast cannot destroy it.

As far as he knew, the space-time realm did not yet have such a powerful ruin.

"Or maybe it's something similar to the ruins of the Tower of True Legends?"

As soon as Ye Tian thought of this, he was a little moved.

If that's the case, then this is a big opportunity!

He took a closer look, and this ruin world was relatively dilapidated, with a total of multiple cracks, and from these cracks could enter this ruin world.

......

"Let's get a replica body in and take a gamble. "

Ye Tian decided.

Wow!

Ye Tian used the legendary eternal technique of Infernal Existence to instantly cross the void area and reach a crack.

At this time, several second-order void beasts sensed Ye Tian's existence and immediately attacked.

The other Void Beasts also attacked, and their reactions were not slow.

"Nothingness!"

"Wall of Will!"

After these two methods, the Void Beast's attack was weakened by more than ninety percent, and it was difficult to cause substantial damage to Ye Tian at all.

In an instant, Ye Tian passed through the crack and entered this world of ruins.

Soon after.

A fifth-order void beast descended, staring at the ruin, its eyes full of anger.

"An ant actually broke into here, who is he, and why does he have so many clones?"

This fifth-order void beast was curious.

It's a pity that he can't enter this ruin world, and neither can other void beasts, it seems that this ruin world forbids void beasts to enter, but allows other beings to enter.

Rumble!!!!

The fifth-order void beast's claws slapped at the ruins world, attacking again and again, but only setting off ripples again and again, and it couldn't cause any damage to the ruins world at all.

Even the fifth-order Void Beast couldn't damage this relic world, but this relic world was broken like this a long time ago, which shows what a terrifying battle it had experienced in the first place. _
